title: The Giants Face a New Threat
description: On pages 9–11, this part follows Unknown person #7, King Harald, Unknown person #8, Usopp, Unknown person #9, Giants as God’s Knights and Elbaf’s ruling tensions push the island toward open conflict while the Straw Hats and giants react to the threat.
scene: God’s Knights and Elbaf’s ruling tensions push the island toward open conflict while the Straw Hats and giants react to the threat.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: knogk it off, old man!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: What hell is even going on here?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How are you even breathing after all those stab wounds?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Why are you trying to kill us?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: And where's all this strength coming from!!!

dialogue.speaker: King Harald
dialogue.text: What happened to you, Harald?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Come back to your senses!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: All guards report to the throne room, now!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He's gone mad!! The king... we have to stop him!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Did a fight break out?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I bet Loki's up to No Good Again!! Hurry!!

dialogue.speaker: King Harald
dialogue.text: We must aid our King!!!

dialogue.speaker: King Harald
dialogue.text: Explain yourself, Harald!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: What happened?!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Elder JARUL!!! What I've done is unforgivable.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: My sanity is slipping beyond my control!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: PLEASE... LISTEN TO ME, LOL!!!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Tell the people of Elbaf...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: ...what happened here!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Tell them about the guards I stayed!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Let it be known that I've repeatedly stained my hands...

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: ...Trying to make Elbaf a Member Nation!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Spread the word about how I was tricked...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: ...and ended up in this miserable state!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: They wanted me to resolve our people...

dialogue.speaker: Giants
dialogue.text: ...As Warriors for the Government!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: WHAT DO YOU MEAN!!! HOW WERE YOU TRICKED?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They never intended to honor my terms from the very start...

dialogue.speaker: King Harald
dialogue.text: My King?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Elder JARUL!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Loki must be the one to eat Elbaf's Secret Treasure!! Please see to it...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: What?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No one else can beat me with these godly powers!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It was never my dream to see Elbaf subjugated by the Government!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: URGH!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I am the worst King in the history of Elbaf!!!

summary: This part advances God’s Knights Tighten Their Grip through 36 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on the immediate conflict, character reactions, and the larger Elbaf mystery.
